step.name: inventory-surfaces
step.action: List every Figma surface the workflow touches (Make / Draw / Sites / Image / REST / Webhook).

step.name: classify-each-surface
step.action: For each surface, mark UI-only or agent-supported per the rule set.

step.name: assign-actor
step.action: Per step: agent / designer / hybrid; document handoff points.

step.name: schedule-revisit
step.action: Add quarterly calendar reminder + watch Figma changelog.
